case_for: Evans has cleared 23 points in three of his last four games and carries a strong 23.2-point consensus projection, showing he's a focal point of Tampa Bay's passing attack with high weekly ceiling.
case_against: Evans has shown boom-or-bust volatility this season, including two games under 8 points (7.2 and 3.7), so a similar down week would leave him well short of the 12-point threshold.
